headline: Top S&P500 movers in Monday's session
summary: Let's have a look at what is happening on the US markets one hour before the close of the markets on Monday. Below you can find the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: Estée Lauder is in talks to merge with Puig amid ongoing turnaround plan
summary: Estée Lauder said Monday the company is in talks to potentially merge with Spanish beauty company Puig.
